title: FDA approves teclistamab with daratumumab in relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma
detail: Approval covers adults after at least one prior line including a proteasome inhibitor and an immunomodulatory agent.

title: FDA expands Darzalex Faspro regimen for transplant-ineligible newly diagnosed disease
detail: The indication covers adults with newly diagnosed multiple myeloma who are ineligible for autologous stem cell transplant.

title: FDA approves a belantamab mafodotin combination for relapsed or refractory disease
detail: The combination is approved after at least two prior lines, including a proteasome inhibitor and an immunomodulatory agent.

title: FDA approves isatuximab-VRd for transplant-ineligible newly diagnosed multiple myeloma
detail: The approval added an anti-CD38 quadruplet option in the newly diagnosed, transplant-ineligible setting.

title: FDA approves daratumumab-VRd for transplant-eligible newly diagnosed multiple myeloma
detail: The regimen was approved for induction and consolidation in adults eligible for autologous stem cell transplant.

title: FDA expands Carvykti into earlier relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma
detail: The CAR-T indication moved to adults after at least one prior line who are lenalidomide-refractory and meet the labeled criteria.

title: FDA expands Abecma into earlier relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma
detail: The CAR-T indication covers adults after two or more prior lines meeting the labeled class-exposure criteria.

title: FDA grants accelerated approval to elranatamab
detail: The BCMA-directed bispecific antibody was approved for heavily pretreated relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma.

title: FDA grants accelerated approval to talquetamab
detail: The GPRC5D-directed bispecific antibody was approved for heavily pretreated relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma.

title: FDA grants accelerated approval to teclistamab
detail: The BCMA-directed CD3 T-cell engager was approved for heavily pretreated relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma.
